subject: GlusterFS sample deployment infrastructure
commit_message:
GlusterFS sample deployment infrastructure

The following patchset provides scripts for deploying a GlusterFS
infrastructure as well as cleanup script, and a sample values.yaml file
to reference or use to deploy glusterFS as global persistent storage
option.

Change-Id: Ib6e4a37742710faf86d9e5a1531fa64f8c0fe2a2
Issue-ID: OOM-1228
Signed-off-by: Stephen Lanthier <slanthie@amdocs.com>
